FACTS ABOUT BURLINGTON

Burlington is positioned at the southwestern part of Lake Ontario, Northeast of Hamilton and the Niagara Peninsula. The population of the city is 205,960, although the frequent festivals make Burlington even more populated all year round. ACME holds a great reputation as the best pest control company in Burlington, which motivates us to constantly implement our pest control services. Whether you live near Fair View, Maple Ave, Spencer Smith Park or any other part of Burlington, you can order our pest control Burlington service. We will send qualified technicians to your house and provide an effective pest control. Our pest control service in Burlington includes cockroach control, bed bug exterminator, mice control, ant removal, wasps nest removal, as well as termite control. With a set of innovative equipment, professional technicians and efficacious solutions, our pest control service will leave your house completely free of pests.Carpenter bees, carpenter ants, mice, raccoons, termites, and bed bugs are only some of the pests we can remove with our pest control in Burlington.

  • The South of Burlington is urban and consists of modern, innovative buildings. On the other side, agriculture, and nature reserves are the synonyms of North of Burlington.
  • Burlington has a total of 580 hectares of parkland and 115 parks.
  • Agriculture was so important in Burlington in the early twentieth-century that the city earned the title of the Garden of Canada.
  • You can see 745 plants of the Lilac collection at the Katie Osborne Lilac Garden at the Royal Botanical Gardens in Burlington. Thus, you have an opportunity to come across the most diverse Lilac collection in the whole world.

BURLINGTON PEST CONTROL SERVICES

TERMITE CONTROL IN BURLINGTON

Termites target the structure of your property and cause enormous internal and external damage. It will take you some time to notice the presence of the termites in your home. These insects will occupy a certain space of your house and then start expanding all over the property. Soon enough, you will deal with huge consequences of termite’s infestation. You can prevent such consequences by ordering termite removal at ACME beforehand. We will examine all the parts of your residential or commercial property and detect the problematic areas. By using our advanced equipment, we can reach absolutely every part of your house. Termites tend to occupy foundations, garages, decks, patios, attics, as well as all the other areas of your property. With our termite control in Burlington, we will save your house on time. In case you don’t order ACME termite removal, the structure of your house will become weak and it will require frequent repairs, which will not be a permanent solution. Thus, you will waste a lot of your time and money. To avoid that, call ACME customer service and request our excellent termite control in Burlington.

BED BUG REMOVAL IN BURLINGTON

Bed bugs are hidden predators that feed and live on your blood and don’t leave you alone even when you sleep! In fact, bed bugs are most active during the night. The warmth of your body and the carbon dioxide from your breath attract bed bugs so they can catch you anywhere – bed, sofa, couch, sides, you name it! Bed bugs can feed on your blood for 3 to 15 minutes. Before the feeding, bed bugs are usually light brown in color and have a flattened oval shape. After feeding, these bugs become rounder and darker, full of your blood! If you notice telltale signs of red or dark brown staining on your bed, you need to order ACME bed bug removal in Burlington urgently! There is no way bed bugs will just leave your house by themselves. You need a professional bed bug treatment to eliminate all the bed bugs from your house. ACME has a highly efficacious bed bug removal service. Our technicians will eliminate all the bed bugs from your property and ensure you, your family members and your pets are no longer harassed by bed bugs during the night.

RODENT CONTROL IN BURLINGTON

When mice and rats find a way to the inside of your property, it will become a mission impossible to get rid of them – until you order our rodent control service in Burlington. If you let rodents take over your house, you will not only clean the piles of dirt they leave behind; you will also run at risk of getting infected with some of the serious diseases that mice and rats spread, such as Hantavirus, Bubonic Plague, Rat-Bite Fever, and Salmonellosis. Home should be the safest place for you, do not let rodents change that! With ACME rat exterminator, and mice control we will carefully examine your entire property and perform an effective rodent removal in Burlington. All you need to do is call ACME and order our rodent control service in Burlington. ACME is the leading provider of pest control services in Burlington. You can order our pest control anytime and our team of experts will soon be at your property, eliminating all the pests that invade your space.
